testcase.name: Idle donut image loads and displays correctly
testcase.system-out: ✓ Donut image loaded successfully ✓ Donut button is interactive ✓ Donut click works smoothly ✓ Donut Empire looks great with the new image!

testcase.name: Donut Empire (Idle) › idle game page loads
Donut Empire (Idle) › displays coin counter at 0
Donut Empire (Idle) › donut button is clickable
Donut Empire (Idle) › clicking donut increases coins
Donut Empire (Idle) › reset button is visible
Donut Empire (Idle) › mute button toggles state
Donut Empire (Idle) › can navigate back to hub
Idle - Persistence › game state saves to localStorage
Idle - Persistence › game state restores after reload
Idle - Persistence › corrupted save does not crash game
Idle - Persistence › offline earnings message appears
Idle - Responsive Design › game adapts to mobile
Idle - Responsive Design › game adapts to tablet
Idle - Responsive Design › game adapts to desktop
